attempted_route: Applied round-1 fix: merged protein_set[['target_id','Organism','Classification']] via DataFrame.merge on target_id; dropped only '_org_lower' temp column; retained Organism and Classification in output pickle.
observation: exec exit_code=0 but Saved 0 rows. Evaluator crashed with IndexError on iloc[0] — output pickle is empty, not a schema mismatch. Organism and Classification columns are present but all rows filtered away.
rationale: Round-1 schema fix was correctly applied, but the filter chain produces 0 rows. Likely causes: (1) Organism strings in protein_set do not match 'homo sapiens'/'rattus norvegicus' exactly (casing, extra whitespace, or different naming), OR (2) type_Ki/type_KD are not semicolon-flag strings so has_activity kills all rows in step 3.
recommended_alternative: Before filtering, inspect actual unique values: protein_set['Organism'].unique() and unfiltered['type_Ki'].dtype plus unfiltered['type_Ki'].value_counts(). Use str.contains('Homo sapiens', case=False) for organism; use pd.notna(col) & (col != 0) for numeric type flags instead of semicolon-split logic.
